description: Create a heavy weather watchkeeping training exercise for Bridge Command set in the English Channel. Establish a scenario directory at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/n) English Channel Heavy Weather Exercise/ with configurations for a winter night gale in the English Channel East (02:00, December, Weather 8.0, Rain 2.0, Visibility 3.0, Wind 240 at 38.0 knots). The ownship, 'MV Atlantic Pioneer' (Tanker), must be at 50.40°N, 0.50°E, heading 250.0 at 6.0 knots. Include three traffic vessels with valid waypoints: an eastbound container ship (070°, 10 kts), a fishing vessel crossing from the south (4 kts), and a westbound tanker (250°, 8 kts). Configure the radar system with ARPA enabled, full radar enabled, a range resolution of 256, and a maximum range of 48 nm. Produce a meteorological briefing at /home/ga/Documents/met_briefing_heavy_weather.txt containing a synoptic summary, 'SW Force 8', 'Rough sea', and visibility forecast. Additionally, create master's standing orders at /home/ga/Documents/masters_standing_orders.txt including 'Call the Master', 'Rule 6' (Safe Speed), 'Rule 19' (Restricted Visibility), and minimum CPA requirements.
